news.t: Japan's Record Run: The Land of the Rising Returns
Japan's Central Bank Holds Rates But Raises Inflation Views
Bank of Japan keeps policy rate steady while raising inflation forecast on Iran war worries
Japan's consumer inflation stays above cenbank's target for 44th month, boosting case for a rate hike

holdings.infoBox: EWJV is an equity ETF with a total of 115 individual holdings. The top holdings are Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group stock at 8.47%, Toyota Motor at 6.50%, Sumitomo Mitsui Financial Group at 5.67%, Mizuho Financial Group at 4.58%, and SoftBank Group at 4.00%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Japan Value ETF (EWJV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Japan Value index. The fund tracks a multi-factor-selected, market cap-weighted portfolio of Japanese equities. EWJV was launched on Mar 5, 2019 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Japan's Record Run: The Land of the Rising Returns
data.text: Japan equities are riding a historic surge, with the Nikkei 225 topping 62,000 for the first time. While the S&P 500 and Nasdaq continue to notch records, Japan is carving out its own bull market, dri...

data.title: Japan's Central Bank Holds Rates But Raises Inflation Views
data.text: The Bank of Japan kept its policy rate at 0.75% but raised inflation forecasts and trimmed growth views as it warned about the impact of a spike in energy prices.

data.title: Bank of Japan keeps policy rate steady while raising inflation forecast on Iran war worries
data.text: The BOJ also cuts its growth forecasts for the fiscal year 2026 to 0.5% from 1%. The bank raised its core inflation forecasts to 2.8% from 1.9%.

data.title: Japan's consumer inflation stays above cenbank's target for 44th month, boosting case for a rate hike
data.text: Core inflation, which strips out prices of fresh food, remained unchanged from 3% in October, and came in line with Reuters-polled economists' average estimate.
